# containerinstance Notes

## Project Info
- **Project path:** `sdk/containerinstance/azure-resourcemanager-containerinstance`
- **Package:** `com.azure.resourcemanager.containerinstance`
- **Manager:** `ContainerInstanceManager`

## Architecture

### Convenience Layer Resources
| Resource | Interface | Implementation | Collection | Collection Impl | In Manager |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ContainerGroup | ✅ `ContainerGroup` | ✅ `ContainerGroupImpl` | ✅ `ContainerGroups` | ✅ `ContainerGroupsImpl` | ✅ `containerGroups()` |
| NGroup | ✅ `NGroup` | ✅ `NGroupImpl` | ✅ `NGroups` | ✅ `NGroupsImpl` | ✅ `nGroups()` |
| CGProfile | ✅ `ContainerGroupProfile` | ✅ `ContainerGroupProfileImpl` | ✅ `ContainerGroupProfiles` | ✅ `ContainerGroupProfilesImpl` | ✅ `containerGroupProfiles()` |

### Inner Models Without Convenience Layer
- None — all resources now have convenience layers.

### Architecture Notes
- **NGroupInner** and **ContainerGroupProfileInner** extend `ProxyResource` (not `Resource`), so they cannot use `GroupableResourceImpl`. Instead, their implementations use `CreatableUpdatableImpl` as the base class with manual region/tags/resourceGroupName handling.
- **NGroupPatch** supports updating: tags, zones, identity, elasticProfile, placementProfile, containerGroupProfiles, updateProfile.
- **ContainerGroupProfilePatch** only supports updating tags.
- **CGProfilesClient** handles CRUD; **CGProfilesOperationsClient** handles list/listByResourceGroup.

## ContainerGroup Property Supplementation Status

### Already Exposed (original)
| Property | Return Type | How Exposed |
|---|---|---|
| containers | `Map<String, Container>` | Direct (from field) |
| externalPorts | `Set<Port>` | Derived |
| externalTcpPorts | `int[]` | Derived |
| externalUdpPorts | `int[]` | Derived |
| volumes | `Map<String, Volume>` | Direct (from field) |
| imageRegistryServers | `Collection<String>` | Derived from `imageRegistryCredentials()` |
| restartPolicy | `ContainerGroupRestartPolicy` | Passthrough |
| dnsPrefix | `String` | Derived from `ipAddress().dnsNameLabel()` |
| fqdn | `String` | Derived from `ipAddress().fqdn()` |
| ipAddress | `String` | Derived from `ipAddress().ip()` |
| isIPAddressPublic | `boolean` | Derived |
| isIPAddressPrivate | `boolean` | Derived |
| osType | `OperatingSystemTypes` | Passthrough |
| state | `String` | Derived from `instanceView().state()` |
| provisioningState | `String` | Passthrough |
| events | `Set<Event>` | Derived from `instanceView().events()` |
| dnsConfig | `DnsConfiguration` | Passthrough |
| autoGeneratedDomainNameLabelScope | `DnsNameLabelReusePolicy` | Derived from `ipAddress()` |
| subnetIds | `List<ContainerGroupSubnetId>` | Passthrough |
| isManagedServiceIdentityEnabled | `boolean` | Derived from `identity()` |
| systemAssignedManagedServiceIdentityTenantId | `String` | Derived from `identity()` |
| systemAssignedManagedServiceIdentityPrincipalId | `String` | Derived from `identity()` |
| managedServiceIdentityType | `ResourceIdentityType` | Derived from `identity()` |
| userAssignedManagedServiceIdentityIds | `Set<String>` | Derived from `identity()` |
| logAnalytics | `LogAnalytics` | Derived from `diagnostics().logAnalytics()` |

### Supplemented (added)
| Property | Return Type | Status |
|---|---|---|
| zones | `List<String>` | ✅ Added |
| sku | `ContainerGroupSku` | ✅ Added |
| encryptionProperties | `EncryptionProperties` | ✅ Added |
| initContainers | `List<InitContainerDefinition>` | ✅ Added |
| extensions | `List<DeploymentExtensionSpec>` | ✅ Added |
| confidentialComputeProperties | `ConfidentialComputeProperties` | ✅ Added |
| priority | `ContainerGroupPriority` | ✅ Added |
| identityAcls | `IdentityAcls` | ✅ Added |
| containerGroupProfile | `ContainerGroupProfileReferenceDefinition` | ✅ Added |
| standbyPoolProfile | `StandbyPoolProfileDefinition` | ✅ Added |
| isCreatedFromStandbyPool | `Boolean` | ✅ Added |
| secretReferences | `List<SecretReference>` | ✅ Added |

### Skipped
| Property | Return Type | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| systemData | `SystemData` | Base resource metadata |
| imageRegistryCredentials | `List<ImageRegistryCredential>` | Already surfaced as `imageRegistryServers()` |
| instanceView | `ContainerGroupPropertiesInstanceView` | Already surfaced as `state()` and `events()` |
| diagnostics | `ContainerGroupDiagnostics` | Already surfaced as `logAnalytics()` |
| identity | `ContainerGroupIdentity` | Already surfaced via MSI helper methods |

## NGroup Convenience Layer

### Properties Exposed
| Property | Return Type | Settable | In Definition | In Update |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| id | `String` | ❌ | — | — |
| name | `String` | ❌ | — | — |
| resourceGroupName | `String` | ❌ | ✅ `withExistingResourceGroup` | — |
| region/regionName | `Region`/`String` | ✅ | ✅ `withRegion` | — |
| tags | `Map<String, String>` | ✅ | ✅ `withTags/withTag` | ✅ `withTags/withTag/withoutTag` |
| zones | `List<String>` | ✅ | ✅ `withZones` | — |
| identity | `NGroupIdentity` | ✅ | — | — |
| elasticProfile | `ElasticProfile` | ✅ | ✅ `withElasticProfile` | ✅ `withElasticProfile` |
| placementProfile | `PlacementProfile` | ✅ | ✅ `withPlacementProfile` | ✅ `withPlacementProfile` |
| containerGroupProfiles | `List<ContainerGroupProfileStub>` | ✅ | ✅ `withContainerGroupProfiles` | ✅ `withContainerGroupProfiles` |
| updateProfile | `UpdateProfile` | ✅ | ✅ `withUpdateProfile` | ✅ `withUpdateProfile` |

### Skipped Properties
| Property | Reason |
|---|---|
| provisioningState | Infrastructure property (per rules) |
| systemData | Base resource metadata |

### Action Methods
| Action | Sync | Async |
|---|---|---|
| start | ✅ `start()` | ✅ `startAsync()` |
| stop | ✅ `stop()` | ✅ `stopAsync()` |
| restart | ✅ `restart()` | ✅ `restartAsync()` |

### Collection Methods (NGroups)
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `define(name)` | Start creating a new NGroup |
| `getByResourceGroup(rg, name)` | Get by resource group and name |
| `getById(id)` | Get by resource ID |
| `listByResourceGroup(rg)` | List by resource group |
| `list()` | List all in subscription |
| `deleteByResourceGroup(rg, name)` | Delete by resource group and name |
| `deleteById(id)` | Delete by resource ID |
| `start(rg, name)` | Start an NGroup |
| `stop(rg, name)` | Stop an NGroup |
| `restart(rg, name)` | Restart an NGroup |

## Tests
- **Test base:** `ContainerInstanceManagementTest` extends `ResourceManagerTestProxyTestBase`
- **Test class:** `ContainerGroupTest` extends `ContainerInstanceManagementTest`
- **Test for supplemented properties:** `testSupplementedProperties()` in `ContainerGroupTest`
- **Test class:** `NGroupTest` extends `ContainerInstanceManagementTest` — `canCRUDNGroup()`
- **Test class:** `ContainerGroupProfileTest` extends `ContainerInstanceManagementTest` — `canCRUDContainerGroupProfile()`
